title: Exercises: Production Readiness for Quantum Applications

exercises.title: Create Production Readiness Criteria
exercises.description: Design a comprehensive set of production readiness criteria for a VQE-based chemistry application.
tasks: Define at least 15 readiness criteria across 5 categories
Assign appropriate weights to each criterion (1.0-3.0)
Specify the required readiness level for each (STAGING, PRE_PRODUCTION, PRODUCTION)
Create evaluation functions that check realistic conditions
Test your criteria against a mock application state
exercises.expectedOutput: A QuantumProductionReadiness object with all criteria defined and a generated readiness report
hints: Consider circuit stability, error handling, observability, security, and documentation
Weight criteria higher that directly impact result quality
PRODUCTION level should be required for anything that affects user-facing results

exercises.title: Build Deployment Checklist System
exercises.description: Extend the deployment checklist to support custom quantum application types.
tasks: Create a checklist template for a QAOA optimization application
Add at least 5 application-specific checklist items
Implement a checklist progress tracking dashboard output
Add support for checklist item dependencies (item B requires item A completed)
Generate a sign-off document with all stakeholder roles
exercises.expectedOutput: Extended QuantumDeploymentChecklist class with dependency support and progress dashboard
hints: QAOA applications need problem encoding validation
Consider adding items for classical optimizer configuration
Dependencies should block completion of dependent items

exercises.title: Configure Quantum Monitoring
exercises.description: Set up comprehensive monitoring for a quantum machine learning application.
tasks: Define 8 quantum-specific metrics for a QML classifier
Configure alerting rules with appropriate thresholds and durations
Create a dashboard configuration with at least 6 panels
Implement a metric collection simulation that generates realistic data
Add anomaly detection for sudden metric changes
exercises.expectedOutput: QuantumProductionMonitor configured for QML with simulated metric collection
hints: Include metrics for model accuracy, training convergence, and inference latency
Consider the probabilistic nature of QML when setting thresholds
Anomaly detection should handle expected variance in quantum results

exercises.title: Write Operational Runbook
exercises.description: Create a detailed runbook for handling quantum hardware maintenance windows.
tasks: Document the trigger conditions for the runbook
Create at least 8 procedural steps with commands
Include verification steps after each action
Add rollback procedures for reversible steps
Export the runbook to markdown format
exercises.expectedOutput: Complete Runbook object for maintenance window handling with markdown export
hints: Maintenance windows require graceful job draining
Consider how to handle in-flight jobs
